summary: Iteration 35: Tested 4 new features - Hero Live Preview position, preview background behavior, unified Pages Manager, and Contact Settings Manager. All backend APIs (12/12 tests) and frontend UI features working correctly.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: HeroSlideForm.js: Live Preview correctly positioned between Layer Positioning and Page Assignment sections
HeroSlideForm.js: Preview background logic correct - gradient only when NO background image (lines 49-51)
PagesManager.js: Clean unified table implementation with system page badges and icons
PagesManager.js: System pages correctly protected from deletion but editable
ContactSettingsManager.js: Simple and effective form for editing contact section text
admin_tools.py: contact-settings GET/PUT endpoints properly store in settings.contact_settings
admin_content.py: seed-system-pages creates Home, News, Gallery, Reading List with correct URLs and system flags
admin_content.py: delete protection for system pages (returns 400 if page.system is true)
HomePage.js: ContactSection correctly receives contactSettings from settings.contact_settings
seed_data_creation: System pages seeded via POST /api/admin/seed-system-pages (Home, News, Gallery, Reading List)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new features verified: (1) Hero Live Preview now between Layer Positioning and Page Assignment, (2) Preview shows background image without gradient when bg is set, shows dark fallback with gradient when no bg, (3) Pages Manager unified single table with system pages having System badges and icons, system pages editable but not deletable, (4) Contact Settings Manager at /admin/contact-settings allows editing title/subtitle/description which displays on homepage contact section.

hero_live_preview_position.details: Live Preview section positioned between Layer Positioning and Page Assignment in HeroSlideForm

hero_preview_background.with_background_image: PASS - Shows actual image WITHOUT gradient overlay
hero_preview_background.without_background_image: PASS - Shows dark fallback (#0f172a) WITH gradient overlay

pages_manager_unified.single_table: PASS - No tabs, unified list of all pages
pages_manager_unified.system_icons: PASS - Home, Newspaper, Image, BookOpen icons for system pages
pages_manager_unified.system_no_delete: PASS - System pages have no delete button
pages_manager_unified.system_editable: PASS - System pages can be edited via PageEditorDialog

contact_settings_api.get_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/admin/contact-settings returns title, subtitle, description
contact_settings_api.auth_required: PASS - Both endpoints require admin auth
contact_settings_api.public_settings: PASS - contact_settings included in public settings for homepage

contact_settings_ui.sidebar_entry: PASS - 'Contact Section' appears after 'Contacts' in admin sidebar
contact_settings_ui.form_fields: PASS - Title, Subtitle, Description inputs present
contact_settings_ui.save_button: PASS - Save button works with success toast
contact_settings_ui.persistence: PASS - Settings persist after page reload

homepage_contact_section.cms_text_display: PASS - Contact section displays CMS-configured title, subtitle, description

system_pages_api.seed_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/admin/seed-system-pages creates Home, News, Gallery, Reading List
system_pages_api.delete_protection: PASS - DELETE returns 400 for system pages
system_pages_api.edit_allowed: PASS - PUT works for system pages
